## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` and `go vet ./...` pass
- [ ] Company appears in baseline with a non-zero count and real titles
- [ ] Display name matches `target_companies.json` conventions (or alias added)
- [ ] `plan/tracker.md` updated
- [ ] Public, unauthenticated endpoints only
